channel.title: BUbreakingSectionTwo
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump’s tariffs are a ‘dirty tax’ that will make the $38.6 trillion national debt crisis even worse over the long term, top analyst says
item.description: "The idea that this is pro-American is actually just the opposite," Penn Wharton's Kent Smetters told Fortune. "It hurts American manufacturers."

item.title: This Fortune 500 CEO says ‘lean manufacturing’—the management philosophy Toyota made famous—is a prerequisite for leveraging AI
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: From mom-and-pops to Goldman Sachs, Jesse Jackson’s vision for American business sparked a revolution
item.description: The civil rights leader, whose dealmaking skills pushed Wall Street to invest in minority-owned businesses, died on Tuesday.

item.title: U.S. Imports Grew in 2025, as Trump’s Tariffs Reshuffled Global Trade
item.description: Data released Thursday by the Census Bureau showed the overall trade deficit with the world narrowed, the result of an expanding trade surplus in serv...

item.title: Who Would Win Gold in the Coward Olympics?
item.description: There are a lot of potential contestants.

item.title: Our Favorite, Most Outrageous and Most Unexpected Moments of the Games
item.description: Three writers and an Olympic medalist on the grit and grace of the winter games.

item.title: It’s no time to go quiet on sustainability. Just ask beauty giant L’Oreal
item.description: L’Oréal is betting millions that sustainability can drive profits as well as protect the planet.

item.title: American Express and Visa alumni raise $4 million for Rhythmic, which partners with brands to provide financial products for their customers
item.description: Startup aims to make stablecoins more accessible to the general public.

item.title: Trump Mulls a North American Trade Pact Without Canada
item.description: U.S. officials are threatening major changes to a trade agreement with Mexico and Canada that could upend the way business is done and leave Canada on...

item.title: Who is Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor?
item.description: The brother of King Charles III was a popular member of the royal family and adored by his mother, Queen Elizabeth II. He fell from grace because of h...

item.title: Former Prince Andrew Is Accused of Misconduct in Public Office: What to Know
item.description: In Britain, the offense carries a maximum sentence of life in prison. No case has ever tested whether a member of Britain’s royal family could be cons...

item.title: Gaza’s Board of Peace: What to Know
item.description: President Trump’s new organization was established to oversee a Gaza cease-fire but has expanded its mandate. Critics say it could undermine the Unite...

item.title: The response from the authorities to the Epstein files has been far more aggressive in Britain.
British Couple Held in Iran Is Sentenced to 10 Years in Prison, Family Says
item.description: Craig and Lindsay Foreman were arrested last year during a motorcycle tour around the world. Their relatives and the British government have rejected ...

item.title: Live Updates: Former Prince Andrew Arrested in Britain Over Epstein Ties
item.description: King Charles III said he supported a “full, fair and proper process” regarding the investigation of his brother Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, adding tha...
